defects.description: Review decisions can be made without complete role separation or quorum
defects.resolution: Mandatory four-role board, independence and quorum validation

defects.description: Evidence packs can be silently mutated after approval
defects.resolution: Version, source hash and immutable snapshot controls

defects.description: Appeals can be decided by the original decision maker
PowerShell closure output can omit evidence needed for founder confirmation
defects.resolution: Delimited complete copy-ready block and dual persisted JSON evidence
